phase0_reanalysis.result_summary: FULL reanalysis from raw probe data. GUM: seed=0.4%, class=13.4%, residual=86.1%. SI-TRV mean |rho|=0.112 (no correlation). Immune fraction=20%. Test indices differ across seeds (cross-seed per-point rho not directly applicable). Trimodal TRV confirmed in all seeds.

phase1_setup.result_summary: ResNet-18 trained to 95.50% test acc. Hessian: manual_gradient_ok. Pass: True

phase1_attribution_compute.result_summary: Full-model 4 methods (EK-FAC, K-FAC, RepSim, TRAK-50) for 500 test x 50K train. J@10(EK-FAC,K-FAC) mean=0.835 std=0.128 (GATE PASS). LDS(EK-FAC,TRAK)=0.297. Kendall tau(IF,RepSim)=-0.467.

phase2b_disagreement.result_summary: FULL 500-point disagreement analysis. Gate PASS: global AUROC=0.691 (>0.60), class-stratified quantile AUROC=0.746 (>0.55). 471/500 IF-better, 29/500 RepSim-better. Tau-LDS_diff rho=0.524 (p=1.25e-36). Partial corr controlling class+grad_norm=0.266 (disagreement is NOT just class proxy).

recovery_log.details: Both phase0_reanalysis and phase1_setup found DONE on remote. Updated status to completed.
